subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath spoken that whereby every fearful one hath found solace, every timid one hath been emboldened, every faltering tongue hath given utterance, and all have arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بما اطمئن به کل خائف و شجع به کل جبان و نطق کل کلیل و قام
